plugins.name: flutter-ddd
plugins.description: Write Flutter/Dart code following Domain-Driven Design (DDD) with Clean Architecture. BLoC, dartz Either/Failure, freezed, retrofit, injectable, auto_route.

plugins.name: line-dev-expert
plugins.description: Build LINE Platform applications — Messaging API bots, LIFF/Mini Apps, LINE Login, LINE Pay, Rich Menus, Flex Messages, CRM, loyalty programs, and Thailand market integrations.

plugins.name: company-craft
plugins.description: Set up and optimize AI agent companies on Paperclip. Bootstrap: analyze workspace, detect tech stack, generate agent instructions, build org chart, seed tickets. Audit: review roster, rebalance workloads, check ticket quality, suggest hires/cuts.

plugins.name: task-authoring
plugins.description: Standards for creating high-quality tickets that cheaper-model worker agents can execute efficiently. Definition of Ready, Definition of Done, acceptance criteria, self-test instructions, and context optimization. Install on lead agents.
